raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "AB 988 implements California's vision for the new nationwide 9-8-8 Suicide Prevention and Mental Health Crisis Hotline.",
    "The new system will provide a critically-needed alternative to 911 and help deploy mental health professionals, rather than police officers, in situations of mental health crises.",
    "AB 988 transforms mental health emergency response and delivers appropriate care that addresses systemic inequalities.",
    "AB 988 will save countless lives of people in mental health crisis.",
    "California is prepared to be a leader in ensuring that mental health emergencies receive a mental health response.",
    "AB 988 can de-criminalize mental illness, decrease fatal police shootings, and put people on the road to recovery.",
    "AB 988 fundamentally changes the approach to mental health crises by putting care and training ahead of confrontation and arrest."
  ]
}
```
